creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
14.1-RELEASE-p1 (patch level 1) with pkgbase is inconsistent with the 
14.1-RELEASE    (non-patched)   that results from use of freebsd-update. 


grahamperrin@14-pkgbase:~ % freebsd-version -kru ; uname -aKU

14.1-RELEASE-p1
14.1-RELEASE-p1
14.1-RELEASE-p1
FreeBSD 14-pkgbase 14.1-RELEASE-p1 FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE-p1 releng/14.1-n267682-0892dff10444 GENERIC amd64 1401000 1401000
grahamperrin@14-pkgbase:~ % 


Reproducible with a FreeBSD-base repo configured for base_release_1: 

pkg install -r FreeBSD-base  -g 'FreeBSD-kernel-*'


base 0892dff104440867956a53e78c12d66090fec36b (2024-06-19)
<https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=0892dff104440867956a53e78c12d66090fec36b>

<https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/0892dff10444>
Add UPDATING entries and bump the branch version. · freebsd/freebsd-src@0892dff
